title: malapoenna polyneura
intro: Malapoenna polyneura, also known as "Tulsi," is a sacred medicinal plant native to India, belonging to the Lamiaceae family and known for its adaptogenic properties. The medicinal properties of Malapoenna polyneura include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which contribute to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. The health benefits of Malapoenna polyneura include improved respiratory health, enhanced cognitive function, and its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Malapoenna polyneura include teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be consumed internally or used externally for topical applications.
